item.title: Best VPN for the UK (2025 Buyer’s Guide)
item.description: The definitive 2025 UK VPN guide: what to look for, audited no-logs, speed & streaming in Britain, protocols, router & Smart TV tips, plus practical troubleshooting.

item.title: VPN Protocols in the UK: WireGuard vs OpenVPN vs IKEv2 (2025)
item.description: UK-focused guide to VPN protocols in 2025: WireGuard vs OpenVPN (TCP/443 & UDP), IKEv2. Which is fastest, most reliable for Netflix UK & BBC iPlayer, and best for privacy?

item.title: Wi‑Fi Security Checklist (UK, 2025)
item.description: Wi‑Fi Security Checklist (UK, 2025) — UK-focused, practical guide.

item.title: VPN for Microsoft Edge (UK, 2025)
item.description: VPN for Microsoft Edge (UK, 2025) — UK-focused, practical guide.

item.title: DAZN with a VPN (UK, 2025) — Working Methods & Fixes
item.description: 2025 UK guide to watching DAZN with a VPN: what actually works, server rotation, OpenVPN TCP/443 fallback for strict Wi-Fi, Smart TV/console tips, and leak checks.

item.title: VPN for Windows (UK, 2025) — Best Settings, Speed & Privacy
item.description: UK-focused Windows VPN guide for 2025: exact app and OS settings (WireGuard/NordLynx, kill switch), split tunneling, DNS/WebRTC leak checks, streaming fixes (Netflix, BBC iPlayer), performance tuning and troubleshooting.

item.title: Double VPN (Multi-Hop) — UK, 2025: When to Use It, Speed Impact & Setup
item.description: UK guide to Double VPN (multi-hop) in 2025: what it is, when it actually helps, speed/latency impact, how to set it up on Windows, macOS, iOS/Android and routers, and when to prefer Dedicated IP, obfuscation or Tor. Includes troubleshooting and FAQ.

item.title: VPN for Students in the UK (2025): Campus Wi-Fi, Streaming & Privacy
item.description: A practical 2025 UK guide for students: safe campus Wi-Fi, beating restrictive networks (TCP/443), best presets for laptops/phones, Netflix iPlayer tips, discounts, and do/don’t rules.

item.title: Sky Go with a VPN (UK, 2025): Working Methods, Error Fixes & Setup
item.description: UK-tested playbook for watching Sky Go with a VPN in 2025: working UK servers, error fixes, TCP/443 fallback, app cache resets, Smart TV & router tips, plus troubleshooting.

item.title: VPN Split Tunneling (UK, 2025) — Smart Routing
item.description: VPN Split Tunneling (UK, 2025) — Smart Routing — UK-focused, practical guide.

item.title: VPN for Public Wi-Fi in the UK (2025): Safe Coffee-Shop & Travel Setup
item.description: UK-focused 2025 guide to staying safe on public Wi-Fi with a VPN: quick setup, best protocols (WireGuard vs OpenVPN TCP/443), captive portals, DNS/WebRTC leak checks, and platform-by-platform steps.

item.title: Proxy vs VPN (UK, 2025): What’s the Difference and Which Should You Use?
item.description: UK-focused guide: proxy vs VPN in 2025. Privacy, encryption, streaming reliability (BBC iPlayer/Netflix UK), speed, and when to use each. Includes quick setup and FAQs.

item.title: VPN for Remote Work in the UK (2025) — Secure WFH Setup, Speed & Compliance
item.description: UK-focused 2025 guide to VPN for remote work: secure WFH presets, WireGuard vs OpenVPN TCP/443, split tunneling for work apps, SSO/MFA, DNS/WebRTC leak checks, and compliance tips for SMEs.

item.title: VPN Port Forwarding (UK, 2025) — When & How
item.description: VPN Port Forwarding (UK, 2025) — When & How — UK-focused, practical guide.

item.title: VPN for Torrenting (UK, 2025) — Safe, Fast & Private
item.description: Complete 2025 UK guide to torrenting with a VPN: safe setup, fastest protocols (WireGuard/NordLynx), anti-throttling tips, qBittorrent/uTorrent settings, legal notes and FAQs.

item.title: Best VPN Settings (UK, 2025) — Speed, Security & Streaming
item.description: Exact VPN presets for the UK in 2025: fastest protocol (WireGuard/NordLynx), kill switch, DNS & leak protection, split-routing, streaming fixes for Netflix & BBC iPlayer, plus troubleshooting.

item.title: Best VPNs for Netflix UK (2025) — Working Methods & Fixes
item.description: A UK-focused Netflix + VPN guide for 2025: working methods, server rotation, protocol tweaks (OpenVPN TCP/443), app cache resets, Smart TV & router tips, plus troubleshooting.

item.title: VPN Kill Switch (UK, 2025) — Why It Matters & How to Configure
item.description: UK-focused guide (2025) to VPN Kill Switch: what it does, why it protects your IP, and how to enable it on Windows, macOS, iOS, Android and routers. Includes tests, real UK use-cases, and troubleshooting matrix.

item.title: VPN on Apple TV (UK, 2025) — Setup & Streaming Fixes
item.description: Step-by-step UK guide (2025) to using a VPN on Apple TV: router setup, Smart DNS, streaming Netflix & BBC iPlayer, troubleshooting, and speed tips.

item.title: VPN for Travel (UK, 2025) — Safe Wi-Fi, Streaming Abroad & Banking
item.description: UK-focused 2025 guide to using a VPN while travelling: airport/hotel Wi-Fi safety, Netflix UK & iPlayer abroad, banking apps, SIM/eSIM tips, captive portals, and the right protocol (OpenVPN TCP/443 vs WireGuard).

item.description: UK-focused macOS VPN guide for 2025: exact app and system settings (WireGuard/NordLynx, kill switch), split tunneling, DNS/WebRTC leak checks, streaming fixes for Netflix & BBC iPlayer, performance tuning and troubleshooting.

item.description: Public Wi‑Fi Security (UK, 2025) — Checklist & Tips — UK-focused, practical guide.

item.title: IP/DNS Leaks: How to Check & Fix (UK, 2025)
item.description: A practical UK guide to detect and fix IP, DNS and WebRTC leaks in 2025. Step-by-step tests, Windows/macOS/iOS/Android/browser fixes, plus router and streaming tips.

item.title: VPN Router Setup (UK, 2025) — Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: A practical UK guide to installing a VPN on your home router in 2025: what you need, OpenVPN/WireGuard profiles, smart TV & console coverage, split tunneling, speed tips and troubleshooting.

item.title: VPN for PS5 & Xbox (UK, 2025) — Router Setup, NAT, Ping & Streaming
item.description: UK guide (2025) to using a VPN with PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series: exact router setup (AsusWRT/OpenWRT), Smart DNS vs full tunnel, NAT Type, port-forwarding myths, gaming ping, streaming apps (BBC iPlayer/Netflix), and troubleshooting matrix.

item.title: VPN & Geo-Blocking in the UK (2025): How It Works + Fixes
item.description: UK-focused guide to geo-blocking in 2025: why platforms block content, how VPNs help, working fixes for iPlayer, Netflix UK, Sky Go, DAZN, travel scenarios, and common errors.

item.title: VPN Security (UK, 2025) — Settings, Threats & Best Practices
item.description: A practical UK guide to VPN security in 2025: essential settings (kill switch, DNS/IPv6), public Wi-Fi hygiene, protocol choices, app/browser hardening, router tips, and troubleshooting.

item.title: VPN for Smart TVs (UK, 2025): Setup, Streaming Fixes & Router/Smart DNS
item.description: UK-focused Smart TV VPN guide for 2025: Android TV/Google TV, LG webOS, Samsung Tizen, Fire TV & Apple TV. Router VPN vs Smart DNS, TCP/443 fallback, app cache resets, Ethernet tips and troubleshooting.
